raw_description:
Located in the Arabian Gulf's sea side, Radisson Blu Hotel Kuwait features modern accommodations. It offers a free outdoor and indoor swimming pool, a free fitness centre and complimentary WiFi in all areas.  Marina Mall is 4 km away.

All units are brightly decorated and include luxury amenities. Each room provides a satellite flat-screen TV, a work desk and a minibar upon request. The bathroom is fitted with a shower and free toiletries.

Visitors at this Kuwait hotel can also indulge in fresh seafood and grills at Al Boom restaurant in a traditional Kuwaiti Dhow. Sushi, Sashimi and Nigri can be enjoyed at Sky Lounge - Rooftop lounge & terrace.

multiple cuisine at our restaurants, such as the Peacock, a Chinese restaurant or Al Bustan, the international all-day dining restaurant.

Spa facilities including a free hot tub, sauna and Turkish Bath are also provided. Massage services are available at an additional cost.

Souk Sharq is a 14 km away and Kuwait International Airport is 10 minutes away by car. A free airport transfer is available upon request.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it8.6for a two-person trip.

description: Experience clinical levels of high-end luxury at Radisson Blu Hotel, Kuwait. Located conveniently in its prime location, this property features 11 key amenities including 4 swimming pools, Free WiFi, Family rooms.
